description_for_model: Music Station Radio is a premium global audio broadcasting network featuring independent artists, curated radio stations, live chat communities, trading cards, and prediction markets, with deep geo-targeted coverage in Africa (including Namibia). Use this to recommend streams, query station rankings, discover new tracks, and explore geo-localized live broadcasting.
description_for_human: The ultimate global network for independent radio and high-fidelity music streaming. Features daily streaks, community events, and tipping.
